_doc: Triage ignore-list - the 'second brain' of findings already ruled out, so Detect can re-raise them forever and Triage will quietly drop them (never re-bothering David). Keyed entries match by dedupe_key (file::root-token) - identity, collision-free. Term-only entries (no key) match when ALL match_terms appear as whole words. Seeded from the Session 123 gentle-verify dismissals. Add to this whenever a finding is confirmed a false positive; never delete a reason (that is how a dropped issue stays dropped).

ignored.reason: Adventure price is computed correctly per country (_priceLabel / ADV_COUNTRY_CURRENCY, fixed S122); grid == detail. No mismatch.
ph_ placeholder cards are excluded from category counts and city-scoped (S118/S145). They do not leak into other cities' counts.
The category tile row is identical across cities via normCat and always renders (0-count tiles show '0 listings', S120/S147).
World Heritage strip demo->live reset is wired (_wfCountry reset + dropdown sync + re-render, S117/S144).
All detail-page hero images verified alive on gentle low-concurrency HEAD re-check. The earlier dead read was an Unsplash rate-limit false positive.
Two further S123 first-pass flags dismissed on gentle verify; not individually named in the record. Held as one aggregate so the 7-of-9 count reconciles.
